title: Rivian raises EV sales forecast as Q2 production ramps up
snippet: The company now expects to ship a few thousand more vehicles by the end of 2026 than it previously expected, after launching its R2 SUV last month.

title: Yep, we’re using OpenClaw to date now
snippet: Ben Guez has "a bunch of potential international wives in [his] DMs," thanks to an automated script he set up using OpenClaw, Claude code, and Instagram trials.

title: Ask HN: Who is quitting? (July 2026)
snippet:
There's a lot of absurdity in this industry right now. I'm curious if anyone else who has the ability to do so is quitting this month.
If so I'm curious:
  1. What pushed you to do it?

  2. What will you be doing? (Even if nothing!)
